rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Elec. Code §253.099, which governs corporate and labor organization expenditures for nonpartisan voter registration campaigns. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 253.099. NONPARTISAN VOTER REGISTRATION AND GET-OUT-THE-VOTE CAMPAIGNS.
_note: No conflict; the cited election code provision governs voter registration expenditures and has no bearing on property tax homestead exemptions.
